children.heading: Broadband internet access service
children.label: 1 Broadband internet access service
children.text: The term “broadband internet access service” has the meaning given the term in section 8.1(b) of title 47, Code of Federal Regulations, or any successor regulation.

children.heading: Broadband map
children.label: 2 Broadband map
children.text: The term “Broadband Map” means the map created by the Commission under .section 642(c)(1)(A) of this title

children.heading: Cell edge probability
children.label: 3 Cell edge probability
children.text: The term “cell edge probability” means the likelihood that the minimum threshold download and upload speeds with respect to broadband internet access service will be met or exceeded at a distance from a base station that is intended to indicate the ultimate edge of the coverage area of a cell.

children.heading: Cell loading
children.label: 4 Cell loading
children.text: The term “cell loading” means the percentage of the available air interface resources of a base station that are used by consumers with respect to broadband internet access service.

children.heading: Clutter
children.label: 5 Clutter
children.text: The term “clutter” means a natural or man-made surface feature that affects the propagation of a signal from a base station.

children.heading: Fabric
children.label: 6 Fabric
children.text: The term “Fabric” means the Broadband Serviceable Location Fabric established under .section 642(b)(1)(B) of this title

children.heading: Form 477
children.label: 7 Form 477
children.text: The term “Form 477” means Form 477 of the Commission relating to local telephone competition and broadband reporting.

children.heading: Indian Tribe
children.label: 8 Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “Indian Tribe” has the meaning given the term “Indian tribe” in .section 5304 of title 25

children.heading: Mobility Fund Phase II
children.label: 9 Mobility Fund Phase II
children.text: The term “Mobility Fund Phase II” means the second phase of the proceeding to provide universal service support from the Mobility Fund (WC Docket No. 10–90; WT Docket No. 10–208).

children.heading: Propagation model
children.label: 10 Propagation model
children.text: The term “propagation model” means a mathematical formulation for the characterization of radio wave propagation as a function of frequency, distance, and other conditions.

children.heading: Provider
children.label: 11 Provider
children.text: The term “provider” means a provider of fixed or mobile broadband internet access service.

children.heading: Quality of service
children.label: 12 Quality of service
children.text: The term “quality of service” means, with respect to broadband internet access service, the download and upload speeds (and, for relevant services, latency) with respect to that service, as determined by, and to the extent otherwise collected by, the Commission.

children.label: A
children.text: regarding the availability of broadband internet access service; and

children.label: B
children.text: that can be viewed, edited, and mapped in geographic information system software.

children.label: A
children.text: means the initiation by a provider of fixed broadband internet access service in an area in which the provider has not previously offered that service, with no charges or delays attributable to the extension of the network of the provider; and

children.label: B
children.text: includes the initiation of fixed broadband internet access service through routine installation that can be completed not later than 10 business days after the date on which the service request is submitted.
